_meta.name: DKMA OEM Registry
_meta.description: Knowledge base of vendor-specific background/autostart/battery settings screens. Used by the ADB installer, root installer, and in-app library. Component names are 'package/activity'. Some vary by ROM version, so each entry lists ordered fallbacks.
_meta.notes: Autostart, 'optimizations', protected apps, per-app battery profiles and pinning are UI-only on stock devices (no public API). Root variant flips them via appops/settings/db where known.

steps.title: Autostart (enable for your app)
steps.hint: Find this app in the Autostart list and turn its toggle ON. This is the single most important step.

steps.title: Battery saver -> No restrictions
steps.hint: Set this app’s battery mode to “No restrictions” (not “Battery saver”).

steps.title: App info (Keep running after screen off)
steps.hint: Open Battery and choose “Unrestricted” / “Keep running after screen off.”

steps.title: Device care -> Battery -> Background usage limits
steps.hint: Make sure this app is NOT in “Sleeping apps” or “Deep sleeping apps.” Remove it if listed.

steps.title: App info -> Battery -> Unrestricted
steps.hint: Open Battery and choose “Unrestricted” / “Keep running after screen off.”

steps.title: App launch / Protected apps (set to Manage manually, all ON)
steps.hint: Switch this app to “Manage manually,” then enable Auto-launch, Secondary launch and Run in background.

steps.title: App info -> Battery
steps.hint: Open Battery and choose “Unrestricted” / “Keep running after screen off.”

steps.title: Startup manager (allow auto-launch)
steps.hint: Allow this app to auto-launch in the Startup manager.

steps.title: App info -> Battery
steps.hint: Open Battery and choose “Unrestricted” / “Keep running after screen off.”

steps.title: Autostart / Background power (allow)
steps.hint: Find this app in the Autostart list and turn its toggle ON. This is the single most important step.

steps.title: App info -> Battery
steps.hint: Open Battery and choose “Unrestricted” / “Keep running after screen off.”

steps.title: Recent apps -> lock the app; then Battery optimization -> Don't optimize
steps.hint: Lock the app card in Recent apps, then set Battery optimization to “Don’t optimize.”

steps.title: Advanced optimization / Deep optimization (disable)
steps.hint: Turn off “Deep / Advanced optimization” for this app.

steps.title: App info -> Battery
steps.hint: Open Battery and choose “Unrestricted” / “Keep running after screen off.”

steps.title: Startup manager (allow auto-launch)
steps.hint: Allow this app to auto-launch in the Startup manager.

steps.title: App info -> Battery
steps.hint: Open Battery and choose “Unrestricted” / “Keep running after screen off.”

steps.title: Security -> Permissions / Background management
steps.hint: In the Security app, allow this app to keep running in the background.

steps.title: App info
steps.hint: Open Battery and choose “Unrestricted” / “Keep running after screen off.”

steps.title: Auto-start manager / Mobile Manager
steps.hint: Allow this app to auto-start via the device’s Mobile/Phone Manager.

steps.title: App info
steps.hint: Open Battery and choose “Unrestricted” / “Keep running after screen off.”

steps.title: STAMINA mode -> exclude app; Battery optimization -> Don't optimize
steps.hint: Add this app to the exceptions of STAMINA / battery-saver mode.

steps.title: App info
steps.hint: Open Battery and choose “Unrestricted” / “Keep running after screen off.”

steps.title: Battery optimization -> Don't optimize
steps.hint: In the battery-optimization list, set this app to “Don’t optimize.”

steps.title: App info
steps.hint: Open Battery and choose “Unrestricted” / “Keep running after screen off.”

steps.title: Battery optimization -> Don't optimize
steps.hint: In the battery-optimization list, set this app to “Don’t optimize.”

steps.title: App info -> Battery -> Unrestricted
steps.hint: Open Battery and choose “Unrestricted” / “Keep running after screen off.”

steps.title: Battery optimization -> Don't optimize
steps.hint: In the battery-optimization list, set this app to “Don’t optimize.”

steps.title: App info
steps.hint: Open Battery and choose “Unrestricted” / “Keep running after screen off.”

steps.title: Battery optimization -> Don't optimize
steps.hint: In the battery-optimization list, set this app to “Don’t optimize.”

steps.title: App info -> Battery -> Unrestricted
steps.hint: Open Battery and choose “Unrestricted” / “Keep running after screen off.”

steps.title: Phone Master -> Auto-start / App freezer
steps.hint: Find this app in the Autostart list and turn its toggle ON. This is the single most important step.

steps.title: App info
steps.hint: Open Battery and choose “Unrestricted” / “Keep running after screen off.”
